'''Dorma''' was an inhabitant of [[Bellassa/Legends|Bellassa]], and was the proprietor of a dining establishment known as [[Dorma's Cafe]] in the [[Cloud Lake]] District of [[Ussa]], during the last years of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] and the early part of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. She was a good cook with a warm smile on her broad, plain face.

After the Empire took over Bellassa, her business dwindled. She would occasionally provide a meal to the orphan [[Trever Flume]].

While she provided some small talk to [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]], she ended the conversation when Obi-Wan began to ask about her former neighbors, [[Olin and Lands]]. In order to protect her establishment, she kicked Obi-Wan out when stormtroopers raided a nearby art gallery.

==Appearances==
*''[[The Last of the Jedi: The Desperate Mission]]'' {{1st}}
